_comment: ARM64 (Graviton) worker launch template. ImageId MUST be an arm64 AMI (see ami-build.md). Create with: aws ec2 create-launch-template --launch-template-name transcoder-<env> --launch-template-data file://launch-template.json. The orchestrator launches via EC2 CreateFleet (type=instant), supplying subnet+instance-type Overrides (WORKER_SUBNET_IDS x WORKER_INSTANCE_TYPES) and deciding Spot-vs-On-Demand itself, so this template MUST NOT set InstanceMarketOptions, and MUST NOT pin a SubnetId (a subnet baked into a NetworkInterface conflicts with the fleet's subnet override). For subnets that do NOT auto-assign a public IP, give a NetworkInterface with AssociatePublicIpAddress:true + Groups but NO SubnetId (the fleet fills the subnet); for auto-assign subnets, use top-level SecurityGroupIds and no NetworkInterface. Bake the instance role tag here (TagSpecifications) so it applies to fleet-launched instances. UserData = base64 of the per-env bootstrap (infra/ami-bootstrap-dev.sh / infra/ami-bootstrap-prod.sh; SSM prefix hardcoded in each). Replace ALL <...> placeholders.
